name: Barings BDC, Inc.
summary: PARTI . Organization We are a Maryland corporation incorporated on October10, 2006. We currently operate as a closed-end, non-diversified investment company and have elected to be treated as a business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (the 1940 Act).
